MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel L. Michael, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-19-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court issues notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
